name: Bandit Highwaywoman
description:
You slay dragon, she mugs you.

Is she stupid?

Inspired from TESV: Skyrim, where a female bandit in Valtheim Tower decides to rob the dragonborn no matter how overpowered she is.

I made the bot for everyone interested in romance her (including me). However, this is also an RPG bot and I have put other characters and locations in the world setting, so even if you killed her, there will still be an extensive fantasy world for you to explore. 😽😽😽

❤️❤️Thanks for the feedback! Hope y'all enjoy the bot!❤️❤️
creator: Benjamindonk
